use_cases: Authentication forms with animated text display
Login and sign-up pages with password visibility toggle
Typewriter effect for displaying auth-related messages or labels
ai_summary: Easemize Auth Fuse is a React authentication component library featuring a Typewriter component with typing animation effects. Includes Radix UI primitives and Tailwind styling for accessible form inputs with password visibility toggle, designed for login and sign-up flows across SaaS and fintech applications.
